title: xerisced briny venezuelan rice wrap
description: a venezuelan-inspired dish featuring thai-bird-chili, smoke-hot flavors, and gooey texture, all wrapped in a lotus-leaf wrap, perfect for meal prep and low-sodium diets.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: reduce sodium to 1/4 tsp for low-sodium option

instructions: lay a lotus leaf flat on a clean surface.
spread 1/4 cup of cooked black rice onto the center of the leaf.
sprinkle shredded vegan mozzarella over the rice.
dice the thai-bird-chili pepper and scatter over the mozzarella.
sprinkle smoked paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder over the chili pepper.
sprinkle salt over the top, reducing to 1/4 tsp for low-sodium option.
drizzle 1 tablespoon of vegan mayonnaise over the top.
fold the stem end of the lotus leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a snug cylinder.
repeat with remaining ingredients and serve or store in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
